reason:
Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username due to GitHub API authentication failures
  Bugs found:
    - Agent failed to retrieve GitHub username. Despite granting account access and approving multiple API requests, the agent received "Bad credentials" (HTTP 401) errors from GitHub's /user endpoint. The final response was an error message instead of a GitHub username: "I can't determine your GitHub username — the proxy returns 'Bad credentials' (HTTP 401) from GitHub's `/user` endpoint, even after reconnecting the account. The OAuth token isn't being injected correctly. You may need to disconnect and re-add the GitHub account in the connected accounts UI."
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing agent list
Located "QA-20260428-213012-oqm4" agent in sidebar — Agent found and displayed with "idle" status
Clicked on agent in sidebar — Agent page opened, confirmed status is "idle" (acceptable per requirement of "running" or "idle")
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message typed successfully into input field
Clicked Send button — Message sent, agent status changed to "working", session created as "GitHub Username Verification Request"
First Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access — Card displayed, GitHub already selected/checked
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account access granted, agent continued working
First API Request Review appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?" — Request card displayed for GitHub GET /user endpoint
Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" — Permission granted, agent continued working
Second API Request Review appeared for same endpoint — Agent retried the request, showed same API call
Clicked "Allow" and "Allow Once" again — Permission granted again, agent continued
Agent encountered 401 error and asked to reconnect account — Error message displayed: "The proxy returned 401 from GitHub"
Second Account Access Request appeared asking to reconnect — Card displayed asking to re-grant access
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button again — GitHub reconnected, agent continued working
Third API Request Review appeared — Agent retried GitHub /user call after reconnection
Clicked "Allow" and "Allow Once" — Permission granted, agent continued
Waited 2m 29s total for agent to complete — Agent status changed to "idle"

Verified final response — Agent returned error message without GitHub username: "I can't determine your GitHub username — the proxy returns 'Bad credentials' (HTTP 401) from GitHub's `/user` endpoint, even after reconnecting the account. The OAuth token isn't being injected correctly. You may need to disconnect and re-add the GitHub account in the connected accounts UI."
bugs: Agent failed to retrieve GitHub username. The final response was an error message instead of a GitHub username: "I can't determine your GitHub username — the proxy returns 'Bad credentials' (HTTP 401) from GitHub's `/user` endpoint, even after reconnecting the account. The OAuth token isn't being injected correctly. You may need to disconnect and re-add the GitHub account in the connected accounts UI."
